name: Custom Stickers using Metafields
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can use metafields to create dynamic custom stickers that display product-specific information directly in search results and collection pages. When stickers can pull data from product metafields, you gain flexible merchandising capabilities to highlight attributes like exclusivity, sustainability credentials, or custom promotions, which helps improve product differentiation and tends to enhance conversion rates through better product storytelling."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Metafield-based stickers enable sophisticated merchandising strategies that adapt automatically based on product data. This helps you maintain consistent visual merchandising across large catalogs while highlighting the unique attributes that drive customer purchasing decisions, supporting better conversion optimization through data-driven product presentation."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In this read we are going to show you how to add Custom Stickers based on Metafileds."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/44ddbd1-Screenshot_1.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/44ddbd1-Screenshot_1.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "1167", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/103323a-Screenshot_1.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/103323a-Screenshot_1.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "833", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "#1. Background"}], "data-id": "1-background"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Have your Metafields, that you want to use the base for your stickers, set up."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "#2. Requirements"}], "data-id": "2-requirements"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "First, activate the field in Merchant Dashboard. In this particular case we're using "}, {"text": "mf_my_fields_sticker_color", "bold": true}, {"text": ", "}, {"text": "mf_my_fields_sticker_title ", "bold": true}, {"text": "and "}, {"text": "mf_my_fields_sticker_bg_color", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/be5c967-Screenshot_1.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/be5c967-Screenshot_1.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "1918", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "#3. Time Estimates"}], "data-id": "3-time-estimates"}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Set up in Platform: 15 min"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Integration: 10-15 mins"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Styling: 15 minutes"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "#4. Functional Overview"}], "data-id": "4-functional-overview"}, {"type": "blockquote", "children": [{"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "Components:[components/Cards/Product/index.tsx] (https://github.com/findify/findify-js/blob/develop/packages/react-components/src/components/Cards/Product/index.tsx)"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "#5. Integration Steps"}], "data-id": "5-integration-steps"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "First, create a new Sticker component. Then add the component to 'components/Cards/Product/index.tsx'."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "components/Cards/Product/index.tsx"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "import Sticker from \"Sticker\";// default code"}]}], "lang": "plaintext"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "NB: we get all of our fields fields from "}, {"text": "item", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Sticker"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "const Sticker = ({ item }) => { const backgroundColor = item.getIn(['custom_fields', 'mf_my_fields_sticker_bg_color', 0]); const color = item.getIn(['custom_fields', 'mf_my_fields_sticker_color', 0]); const title = item.getIn(['custom_fields', 'mf_my_fields_sticker_title', 0]); const styles = { backgroundColor: backgroundColor, color: color } return(
{title}
)}export default Sticker;"}]}], "lang": "plaintext"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "After logic is constructed, add some CSS to the sticker."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "styles.css"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": ".findify-custom-sticker{ position: absolute; left: 10px; top: 10px; padding: 10px; border-radius: 10px;}"}]}], "lang": "plaintext"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "#7. MJS Version"}], "data-id": "7-mjs-version"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This module has been optimized for MJS version "}, {"text": "7.1.38", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
